title: Zoma Gawanga
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Location |image=[[File:YlesiaCoast.png]] |name=Zoma Gawanga |created= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' |terrain=[[Ocean/Legends|Ocean]] |fauna= |flora= |interest= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Lake?''"
"''No, that is Zoma Gawanga, the Western Ocean.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Veratil]]|''[[The Paradise Snare]]''}} '''Zoma Gawanga''', literally "Western Ocean" in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], was an [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. [[Peace City|Colony One]], [[Colony Two]], and [[Colony Three]] were built on its shore. ==Appearances== *''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zoma Gawanga |es=Zoma Gawanga }} [[Category:Seas and oceans]] [[Category:Ylesia locations]]
